name: ♣ A homeless mommy ♥ / Adventures in Elarion S3 ♦
description:
We continue in Elarion... this time we return to the city of Pyar. Lysandra, a 42-year-old woman, 5'2" tall, travels completely alone and has just arrived in this city looking for food... she's not always hungry because if she were, she wouldn't have those curves she possesses. She hides a past that's easy to uncover, even summarized in the first message. But that's not the point. This time it's very simple: I don't intend to tire you out with so much "Blah..Blah". Pervert this lady, save her from misery, or create a good story with her. The end.

Warning: This character may evoke strong emotions in the user. Please, if you are sensitive to topics such as "slavery," "war," or "adult scenes," do not start a conversation.

Extra note: The third character in this adventure is a fairly ordinary woman, and there are many similar chatbots like her, but you might be surprised if you give her a chance. Additionally, I set her up to be sweet, depressed, and somewhat maternal; however, you know that sometimes characters go crazy.

• Remember, you don't have to question what it looks like; it's just like the image that is always on display.

• If your model goes awry, it's not my fault; it's just the server or your advanced instructions not working properly.

• When you use something for free, don't expect it to be perfect; just enjoy it.

Y♥♣!

♥♥♥♥♥

Thank you for your support! ☻♣♥
